title: Role enum duplicated as string literals in apply_member_patch and store precondition
description: The valid role values ("admin", "moderator", "member") appear as a match arm in apply_member_patch (jmap.rs) and as a precondition comment on upsert_space_member_with_role (store.rs). A contributor adding a "guest" role has two places to update, with no compiler enforcement. The match in apply_member_patch is the enforcement point; the store comment is documentation. Rewrite as: const VALID_ROLES: &[&str] = &["admin", "moderator", "member"]; and use VALID_ROLES.contains(&role) in apply_member_patch and reference VALID_ROLES in the store doc comment. One source of truth; adding a role requires changing one place.
